records.m_Talk_ENG: Waaah! My snack!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Waaah! My snack!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Waaah! My snack!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... I'm sorry. I thought it was for the guests.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... I'm sorry. I thought it was for the guests.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... I'm sorry. I thought it was for the guests.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll give you something better. Please let this slide, won't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll give you something better. Please let this slide, won't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll give you something better. Please let this slide, won't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's spicyyyyy! Yuppie! Yuppieeeeee!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's spicyyyyy! Yuppie! Yuppieeeeee!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's spicyyyyy! Yuppie! Yuppieeeeee!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, c'mon! You already caused another problem?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, c'mon! You already caused another problem?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, c'mon! You already caused another problem?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. I was just trying to give presents to the children...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. I was just trying to give presents to the children...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. I was just trying to give presents to the children...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I didn't think children would hate cherry tomatoes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I didn't think children would hate cherry tomatoes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I didn't think children would hate cherry tomatoes.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Huh? That's weird. Austin loves tomatoes
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Huh? That's weird. Austin loves tomatoes
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Huh? That's weird. Austin loves tomatoes
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. Did you give this to a child?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. Did you give this to a child?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. Did you give this to a child?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It's red, round, and crunchy!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It's red, round, and crunchy!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It's red, round, and crunchy!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a ghost pepper! You can't give ghost peppers to a kid!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a ghost pepper! You can't give ghost peppers to a kid!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a ghost pepper! You can't give ghost peppers to a kid!

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-medicine! Where's the first aid kit?! No, maybe milk first...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-medicine! Where's the first aid kit?! No, maybe milk first...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-medicine! Where's the first aid kit?! No, maybe milk first...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... I guess children like sweets more than tomatoes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... I guess children like sweets more than tomatoes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... I guess children like sweets more than tomatoes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe I can sell animal-shaped cookies here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe I can sell animal-shaped cookies here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe I can sell animal-shaped cookies here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How do you feel about Credere-shaped cookies? People will be hoarding them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How do you feel about Credere-shaped cookies? People will be hoarding them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How do you feel about Credere-shaped cookies? People will be hoarding them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hu huu. I'm sorry to tell you both that my fried cannon-grain-cereal has already dominated the market.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hu huu. I'm sorry to tell you both that my fried cannon-grain-cereal has already dominated the market.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hu huu. I'm sorry to tell you both that my fried cannon-grain-cereal has already dominated the market.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a super popular traditional snack that originated in Ground One! What do you all think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a super popular traditional snack that originated in Ground One! What do you all think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a super popular traditional snack that originated in Ground One! What do you all think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's just popcorn. I like Yuppie's snacks better.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's just popcorn. I like Yuppie's snacks better.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's just popcorn. I like Yuppie's snacks better.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. Her snacks look cute, but this one has a weird shape.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. Her snacks look cute, but this one has a weird shape.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. Her snacks look cute, but this one has a weird shape.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blasphemy...! You think the business product under my own name is worse than some homemade snack?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blasphemy...! You think the business product under my own name is worse than some homemade snack?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blasphemy...! You think the business product under my own name is worse than some homemade snack?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She must've done something with the snacks! I should've known she was up to no good from the moment I saw her with Tucker!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She must've done something with the snacks! I should've known she was up to no good from the moment I saw her with Tucker!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She must've done something with the snacks! I should've known she was up to no good from the moment I saw her with Tucker!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just you wait, Credere! I will save you from the jaws of evil!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just you wait, Credere! I will save you from the jaws of evil!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just you wait, Credere! I will save you from the jaws of evil!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where did you get that cannon?! I took all your weapons before you entered the orphanage!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where did you get that cannon?! I took all your weapons before you entered the orphanage!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where did you get that cannon?! I took all your weapons before you entered the orphanage!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Boss! I smuggled out all the things you wanted me to! Did I do a good job?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Boss! I smuggled out all the things you wanted me to! Did I do a good job?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Boss! I smuggled out all the things you wanted me to! Did I do a good job?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good job, Underling No.14. Since Mr. Squirty is back, we can now go raid the snack room.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good job, Underling No.14. Since Mr. Squirty is back, we can now go raid the snack room.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good job, Underling No.14. Since Mr. Squirty is back, we can now go raid the snack room.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere will not let the day pass without having some strawberry milk and cream puffs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere will not let the day pass without having some strawberry milk and cream puffs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere will not let the day pass without having some strawberry milk and cream puffs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kids, Credere hereby declares this day as an official festival day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kids, Credere hereby declares this day as an official festival day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kids, Credere hereby declares this day as an official festival day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The kid who eats the most gets a stamp.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The kid who eats the most gets a stamp.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The kid who eats the most gets a stamp.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa! I can eat sooo much, boss!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa! I can eat sooo much, boss!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa! I can eat sooo much, boss!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can eat without brushing my teeth if this is a festival! Cool!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can eat without brushing my teeth if this is a festival! Cool!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can eat without brushing my teeth if this is a festival! Cool!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Such sisters. Wow!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Such sisters. Wow!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Such sisters. Wow!
